//1: snowflake-claims-platform :: VS Code MCP client configuration
//3: VS Code (with MCP support / GitHub Copilot Agent mode) reads 'servers'.
//4: 'inputs' prompt for secrets at startup so tokens are never committed.
//5: All data in this platform is SYNTHETIC. There is no real PHI/PII.

inputs.description: Short-lived Snowflake PAT for a CLAIMS_MCP_READER user (managed MCP)
Private key passphrase for the fallback local server (optional)

_snowflake-claims-fallback.//note: FALLBACK ONLY (not primary). Local Python stdio server. Use only when
_snowflake-claims-fallback.//note2: the Snowflake-managed MCP server is unavailable. Read-only / SELECT-only /
_snowflake-claims-fallback.//note3: schema-allowlisted; logs to AUDIT.MCP_QUERY_LOG. Remove leading underscore

_snowflake-claims-fallback-sso.//note: FALLBACK ONLY (local-dev SSO variant). Same local stdio server with
_snowflake-claims-fallback-sso.//note2: externalbrowser (Snowflake SSO) auth. Opens a browser to log in; use only
_snowflake-claims-fallback-sso.//note3: on a machine with a browser (not headless). Remove leading underscore to enable.
